readings.summary: The Lord promises a new covenant.

readings.citation:
Ps 51:3-4, 12-13, 14-15, R. v.12a
Create a clean heart in me, O God.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 51:3-4, 12-13, 14-15, R. v.12a
Create a clean heart in me, O God.

readings.summary: Christ is the source of salvation for all who obey.

Whoever serves me must follow me, says the Lord;
and where I am, there also will my servant be.
Jesus foretells of his death and resurrection.

antiphons.text:
Give me justice, O God,
and plead my cause against a nation that is faithless.
From the deceitful and cunning rescue me,
for you, O God, are my strength.

Amen, Amen I say to you: Unless a grain of wheat
falls to the ground and dies, it remains a single grain.
But if it dies, it bears much fruit.
